beat.title: Broken Gate
beat.boundaryReason: The session opens with the party forcing the gate, following the hidden tunnel into Raven's Hold, and regrouping in the old storeroom once Wellby catches up.
dateEvidence: The manifest starts and ends the session on 1748-04-12.
This opening infiltration scene unfolds continuously with no rest or overnight break.

dateEvidence: The ambush begins as soon as Delwath finishes reporting back.
The prison search happens in the immediate aftermath of the fight with no date break.

beat.title: Watching Raven's Hold
beat.boundaryReason: From the prison and tower approach, the party studies the layout of Raven's Hold, watches gnolls and animal pens, and settles on sending Kenzo to scout invisibly once it grows darker.
dateEvidence: This beat continues directly from the prison search.
The party explicitly notes that it is getting dark only near the end of the planning scene, supporting a late-afternoon window.
